sub_modules.fp_hpf_coeff_rom: Combinational coefficient bank that emits the 101 exact binary32 high-pass FIR coefficients as a packed vector.
sub_modules.fp_hpf_fir_dot: Combinational FIR dot product over the packed sample history and coefficient vector, producing one binary32 output word.
sub_modules.fp_hpf_fp_mul: Standalone combinational binary32 multiply reference primitive for decomposition and independent verification.
sub_modules.fp_hpf_fp_add: Standalone combinational binary32 add reference primitive for decomposition and independent verification.
